Description: Waterproofing membrane failure at wet area floor junction. Water tracking to Level 1 ceiling below.
Notes: Remediation plan submitted. Requires tile removal, re-membrane, and re-tile. 3 week program.

Description: Cracking in polished concrete floor slab. 3 cracks >0.3mm width, longest 2.4m.
Notes: Structural engineer review requested. May require epoxy injection. Awaiting crack monitoring results.

Description: Paint finish inconsistency on feature bulkhead. Visible roller marks and colour variation between panels.
Notes: Repainted 15 Jan. Awaiting architect sign-off on colour match under installed lighting conditions.

Description: Fire collar missing at services penetration through fire-rated wall in riser cupboard.
Notes: Identified during BCA audit. All riser cupboards Levels 8-15 to be re-inspected.

Description: HVAC ductwork support brackets not installed to specification. 6 brackets missing isolation grommets.
Notes: Non-structural but causes vibration noise. Brackets accessible — straightforward fix.
